hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase

layout.spacing_system: Generous (p-8, p-12, p-16). Containers with borders must have internal padding of p-6 or p-8.
layout.grid_system: Tetris Grid for categories (col-span-full md:col-span-8, etc). Control Room grid for Admin dashboard.
layout.header: Crystal Glassmorphism. bg-black/60 with backdrop-blur-2xl and 1px border-white/10.
layout.cards: Solid surface background (#141414) with 1px border-white/10. NO massive shadows. Flat and crisp.

components.button: Square or very slightly rounded (rounded-sm). If primary: bg-[#FFB800] text-black font-bold hover:bg-[#F59E0B]. If secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#FFB800]/50 text-[#FFB800] hover:bg-[#FFB800]/10.
components.input: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#FFB800] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FFB800]
components.badge: bg-[#FFB800]/10 text-[#FFB800] border border-[#FFB800]/20 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

animations.entrance: framer-motion staggered fade-up for product lists

home.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Large typography on left. Cinematic hookah image on right with black/40 overlay blending into background.
home.categories: Bento grid layout showing Hookahs, Coals, Flavors, Accessories, Bases. Using large image background cards with heavy bottom gradients for text readability.
home.featured_products: Clean horizontal scroll or 4-col grid. Minimalist product cards.

pages.shop: Sidebar with categories/filters. 3-col or 4-col product grid. Clean and dense.
pages.product_detail: Two-column layout. Huge sticky image on left. Typography and add-to-cart on right. Generous whitespace.
pages.cart: Slide-out sheet (Shadcn) or dedicated clean page with order summary.
pages.admin: Control room grid. Dense Shadcn tables. Sidebar navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use the Dark Theme. Implement colors exactly as specified.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body. Update tailwind.config.js and index.css to import and set these.
Ensure all cards have a 1px border of white/10 and flat backgrounds (#141414). Avoid muddy shadow blobs.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a high-end luxury feel. Install it via 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react'.
Create a 'Bento Grid' for the categories on the homepage (e.g., Hookahs taking up a large span, Coals taking a smaller square).
For the admin panel, use Shadcn tables, but keep the dark high-contrast aesthetic. It should look like a professional control room.
Ensure the hero section uses the provided image with a dark gradient overlay (e.g., bg-black/50 to bg-gradient-to-t) so the text is fully readable.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, links, cart actions) using kebab-case role-based names.
